prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `759f3fd3`.
codex_response:
Implemented `759f3fd3` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: keep the green cross unchanged, then fill every non-green cell on positive even Chebyshev-distance square rings around the intersection with yellow `4`. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting hypothesis because it matched all official examples; no new primitive was needed.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_759f3fd3/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_759f3fd3/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_759f3fd3/generator.py#L1). The generator stays close to the official family by sampling even-sized square blank grids with a single off-center green cross and then deriving the same even-radius ring pattern directly.

Validation passed: `3/3` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts were produced at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/759f3fd3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/759f3fd3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/759f3fd3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/759f3fd3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/759f3fd3/previews/preview_03.png).
